name: Decadent Oatmeal
recipeInstructions:
1. Core the apples and chop.
2. Chop the dried apricots.
3. Combine the chopped apples, apricots, raisins with the apple juice in a large pot.
4. Bring to a boil over high heat.
5. Reduce heat to maintain a simmer and cook for 1 minute.
6. Add the oatmeal and stir gently.
7. Cook until the oatmeal is tender and has absorbed most of the liquid (about 5 minutes).
8. Remove from heat and cover the pot with a lid.
9. Let the mixture sit for a couple of minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
10. Serve hot over sliced banana or on its own.
